name: chief-of-staff
description: Reusable Codex guidance for setting up quiet, review-gated chief-of-staff automation lanes.

interface.shortDescription: Set up quiet Codex chief-of-staff automations.
interface.longDescription: Chief of Staff helps Codex create a pinned HQ thread and recurring, read-only automation lanes for briefs, inbox triage, project blockers, and research-to-practice scouting while keeping local profile data separate.
defaultPrompt: Set up a Codex chief-of-staff system for me.
Create quiet automation lanes for morning brief, inbox urgency, and project blockers.
Adapt the Chief of Staff templates to my local profile.
